notes: Frontmatter description and role responsibilities define the planner as the planning specialist for implementation work.
Workflow steps define the plan flow from pre-creation through task hydration and cook handoff reminder.
The plan workflow explicitly says to write the comprehensive plan via the planner subagent.
The reference defines plan.md as the overview plan artifact and requires YAML frontmatter.
Hydration workflow says the planning workflow writes plan.md and phase files as the persistent output layer.
Defines the development rules file and its general operating constraints.
Defines the project documentation management rule, update triggers, and update protocol.
Defines mandatory delegation context and required plans/reports path context for spawned subagents.
Defines the primary workflow entrypoint and the planning-first implementation flow.
Defines teammate-only coordination rules for Agent Team sessions.
The planning skill explicitly routes unclear or argument-less invocations through AskUserQuestion.
The team coordination rule explicitly defines SendMessage usage for peer and team communication.
The planning skill hydration workflow explicitly creates Claude Tasks from plan phases.
Planner team mode explicitly says to read the full task description via TaskGet.
Planner team mode explicitly starts by checking TaskList.
Cook defines the Task(subagent_type=...) spawn pattern for mandatory delegated subagent work.
Planner team mode explicitly claims and completes work via TaskUpdate.
Team skill pre-flight requires TeamCreate at step 2 of every template.
Team skill explicitly requires TeamDelete during cleanup after shutdown.
The planning skill explicitly consumes hook-injected plan context for active/suggested/none state and report path behavior.
Planning defaults to AskUserQuestion when invoked without arguments or with unclear intent.
Planning hydrates work by creating Claude Tasks from phases.
Planning checks hook-injected plan context to determine active plan state and output path behavior.
Development rules explicitly refer to plan context from hook injection when placing generated visuals.
Primary workflow explicitly delegates planning to the planner agent before implementation starts.
Documentation management explicitly lists plan.md as the overview access point in plan file organization.
Planner team mode begins by checking TaskList.
Planner team mode reads the full task description via TaskGet.
Planner team mode uses TaskUpdate to claim and complete work.
Planner team mode sends plan summaries and coordination messages via SendMessage.
Frontmatter defines the brainstormer agent and its role in solution ideation before implementation.
Frontmatter defines the code-reviewer agent and its evidence-driven review role.
Frontmatter defines the debugger agent and its investigation and diagnostic reporting role.
Frontmatter defines the docs-manager agent and its responsibility for technical documentation maintenance.
Frontmatter defines the git-manager agent and its stage/commit/push responsibilities.
Frontmatter defines the project-manager agent and its progress-tracking and coordination role.
Frontmatter defines the researcher agent and its comprehensive technical research role.
Frontmatter defines the tester agent and its code validation and quality assurance role.
Frontmatter and heading define the brainstorm skill for ideation and architectural decision support.
Frontmatter and heading define the code-review skill and its rigorous evidence-based review purpose.
Frontmatter and heading define the cook skill as the end-to-end implementation workflow.
Frontmatter and heading define the debug skill as the systematic investigation workflow.
Frontmatter and heading define the docs skill as the documentation management workflow.
Frontmatter and heading define the fix skill for issue resolution workflows.
Frontmatter and heading define the plan skill for planning implementations and architecture work.
Frontmatter and heading define the preview skill for viewing and generating visual explanations.
Frontmatter and heading define the scout skill for parallel codebase scouting.
Frontmatter and heading define the team skill for Agent Teams orchestration.
Frontmatter and heading define the test skill for unit, integration, e2e, and UI testing.
The plan skill definition and heading establish it as the source skill for the planning workflow.
The brainstorm workflow scouts context, questions the user, evaluates options, documents a decision, and optionally hands off to planning.
The cook workflow overview defines the end-to-end path from intent detection through review, implementation, testing, and finalize.
The debug workflow is defined as root-cause-first investigation with validation before any fix claims.
The fix workflow selects a mode, runs debug first, orchestrates work by complexity, verifies the fix, and then finalizes.
The review workflow is the task-managed scout -> review -> fix -> verify pipeline.
The team workflow requires TeamCreate pre-flight and then executes the selected team template sequence in order.
The test workflow covers code testing, UI testing, and structured QA report generation.
Brainstorm output is a detailed markdown summary report capturing requirements, evaluated approaches, rationale, risks, and next steps.
The debug team template writes a root-cause report to a debug-{issue-slug}.md path in the reports directory.
Reporting standards define the required structure and hook-driven naming for debug investigation reports.
The team cook finalize step emits an explicit docs impact block with impact classification and follow-up action.
Team coordination rules require the lead to evaluate docs impact explicitly after implementation tasks.
Git-manager team mode defines a git operation summary sent back to the lead after requested git work completes.
Cook finalize always ends by asking whether to hand work off to the git-manager subagent for commit operations.
Phase files are named phase-XX-name.md and carry the detailed implementation contract for each plan phase.
The team review template synthesizes findings into a review-{scope-slug}.md report with deduplicated severity-ranked action items.
The code-reviewer agent defines the canonical structure for the review summary output.
Scout defines a markdown report listing relevant files and unresolved questions.
The test report reference defines the QA report template, metrics, failed-test sections, and naming rules.
Cook marks finalize as mandatory in all modes and enumerates the required sync, docs, task, and git steps.
Fix also marks finalize as mandatory and requires docs sync, task completion, and optional git handoff.
Team coordination rules define the plan approval flow when plan mode is required.
Cook always enforces code review approval, either via user approval or auto-approve with score and criticality constraints.
Cook requires 100 percent passing tests before finalize and treats post-testing approval as a blocking checkpoint.
The brainstorm skill definition establishes it as the source skill for the brainstorm workflow.
The cook skill definition establishes it as the source skill for the cook workflow.
The debug skill definition establishes it as the source skill for the debug workflow.
The fix skill definition establishes it as the source skill for the fix workflow.
The code-review skill definition establishes it as the source skill for the review workflow.
The team skill definition establishes it as the source skill for the team workflow.
The test skill definition establishes it as the source skill for the test workflow.
Brainstorm uses AskUserQuestion for discovery, debate, and final plan-continuity confirmation.
Review without arguments must use AskUserQuestion to route the requested review operation.
Fix uses AskUserQuestion to choose workflow mode when the request does not specify auto mode.
Test without arguments uses AskUserQuestion to select the requested test operation.
Team pre-flight requires TeamCreate before any template continues.
Team templates clean up via TeamDelete after shutdown.
Team templates send shutdown requests to teammates via SendMessage.
Team templates register teammate work with TaskCreate.
Team templates spawn teammates through Task calls with subagent_type and team_name.
Team teammate prompts must include CK Context values injected by hooks for reports, plans, naming, branch, and active plan state.
Cook explicitly uses TaskCreate during implementation.
Cook explicitly uses TaskUpdate during implementation.
Cook explicitly uses TaskGet during implementation.
Cook explicitly uses TaskList during implementation.
Cook mandates Task-based subagent spawning for testing, review, and finalization phases.
Cook delegates the research phase to the researcher subagent when that phase is active.
Cook delegates planning to the planner subagent unless it is executing an existing code-mode plan.
Cook mandates spawning the tester subagent during the testing phase.
Cook mandates spawning the debugger subagent during the testing phase.
Cook mandates spawning the code-reviewer subagent during the review phase.
Cook finalize mandates the project-manager subagent for full plan sync-back.
Cook finalize mandates the docs-manager subagent.
Cook finalize mandates the git-manager subagent when the user wants commit operations.
Review requests dispatch the code-reviewer subagent after scout findings are ready.
Fix activates the ck:debug skill as its mandatory second step.
Brainstorm starts with ck:scout to discover relevant files and docs before discovery questions.
Review performs scout-based edge case analysis before code review.
Scout results are aggregated into a markdown scout report with relevant files and unresolved questions.
Cook blocks at post-plan approval before implementation in non-auto modes.
Cook always enforces code review approval before claiming completion.
Cook requires 100 percent passing tests before finalize unless no-test mode is explicitly selected.
The team cook wrapper emits a docs impact block as part of ck:cook finalization reporting.
Brainstorm finalize asks whether to create a detailed implementation plan and, on yes, invokes ck:plan with the brainstorm summary context.
Same-session cook handoff says planning hydrates tasks and cook picks them up directly.
Fix runs debug first and creates a findings report for the next step before implementation begins.
The review task pipeline blocks a fix task on completion of the review task.
Brainstorm concludes with a markdown summary report of the agreed solution.
The planning workflow writes plan.md and phase files as the persistent output layer before task hydration.
The team review template synthesizes reviewer output into a final review report.
Debug explicitly loads reporting standards when an investigation report or diagnostic summary is needed.
The team debug template reads debugger reports and writes a root-cause report to the debug report path.
The test workflow ends by producing a structured summary report after executing and analyzing test suites.
Cook marks finalize as mandatory and enumerates the required finalization actions.
Fix marks finalize as mandatory and blocks completion on docs sync, task completion, and git handoff prompt.
Cook finalize ends by asking whether to hand work off to git-manager for commit operations.
Git-manager reports a git operation summary back to the lead, which defines the git handoff payload.
Research skill frontmatter defines ck:research as the reusable research skill for technical evaluation, architecture analysis, and requirements gathering.
The research skill defines a four-phase workflow covering scope definition, systematic information gathering, analysis and synthesis, and report generation.
Research output is saved to the `Report:` path provided by the injected `## Naming` section, which defines a reusable reports-path context dependency.
The ck:research skill frontmatter and heading establish the research workflow entrypoint.
The research workflow explicitly stores output using the `Report:` path from injected naming context and asks for that path if it is missing.
This markdown file is a reusable feature implementation plan template with context links, phased tasks, testing strategy, and a TODO checklist.
This markdown file is a reusable bug-fix implementation plan template covering symptoms, root cause, solution design, verification, rollback, and checklist steps.
This markdown file is a reusable refactoring plan template with current-state analysis, phased implementation, backward-compatibility, and success-metric sections.
This guide defines when to select each plan template, how to adapt it, and how to keep plan context concise through references instead of duplication.
The docs skill defines a routed documentation workflow with init, update, and summarize operations plus shared docs-directory context.
The scout skill defines a workflow that analyzes the task, divides the codebase, registers scout tasks, spawns parallel agents, and aggregates results into a report.
The preview skill defines a routed workflow spanning interactive operation selection, generation-mode routing, path resolution, and view-mode execution.
The docs workflow explicitly treats the `docs/` directory as the documentation source of truth and lists the canonical files that live there.
Preview generation falls back to `plans/visuals/{topic-slug}.md` when no active plan exists, which defines a reusable plans-path output context.
The summarize workflow explicitly updates `docs/codebase-summary.md`, which provides a stable markdown artifact contract for the codebase summary document.
Preview generation writes visual output to markdown files under a plan-specific `visuals/` directory or the fallback `plans/visuals/` directory.
The ck:docs skill frontmatter and heading establish the documentation workflow entrypoint.
The docs workflow uses AskUserQuestion to choose the documentation operation when invoked without arguments or with unclear routing.
The docs summarize flow explicitly activates ck:scout before updating documentation.
The docs workflow explicitly uses `docs/` as the source-of-truth directory for documentation work.
The summarize workflow updates `docs/codebase-summary.md`, so the docs workflow can produce the codebase summary document.
The ck:scout skill frontmatter and heading establish the scout workflow entrypoint.
Scout checks TaskList first before registering new scout tasks.
Scout registers per-agent work with TaskCreate when coordination overhead is justified.
Scout uses TaskUpdate to mark scout tasks in progress and completed during result collection.
Internal scout mode explicitly spawns Explore subagents via the Task tool to search the codebase in parallel.
Scout aggregates findings into a markdown scout report with relevant files and unresolved questions.
The ck:preview skill frontmatter and heading establish the preview workflow entrypoint.
The preview workflow uses AskUserQuestion to select a preview operation when invoked without arguments.
Preview generation checks active plan context from hook injection before choosing its output location.
Preview generation explicitly falls back to the `plans/visuals/` location when no active plan context exists.
Preview generation saves its output to a markdown file in a visuals directory derived from the active plan or the default plans path.
